positive: A majestic, stylized celestial mountain range silhouette at sunset. The mountain peaks should feature crystal formations and bioluminescent energy flowing through the ridges, contrasted against a deep gradient sky of sapphire blue, burnt orange, and violet. Incorporate stylized constellations and crescent moons orbiting the peaks. The style should be highly detailed, vector-graphic inspired, with clean lines, strong negative space, and a central, balanced composition. Studio shot, high contrast, symmetrical, printable t-shirt print quality, digital art, rule of thirds.
